summary: Clear, high‑end soundboard source captures a hot mid‑80s show with a scorching China > Rider and inspired Terrapin Station performances.
review: The recording is praised for its clarity, separation and extra high‑frequency detail compared to other SBD releases. Musically the concert bursts with energy – a smoky West L.A. Fadeaway, hot solos from Jerry and Brent on Minglewood, and a second‑set lift‑off featuring China > Rider, inspired Playing in the Band and Terrapin Station, plus powerful Truckin' and Wharf Rat. The omission of the US Blues encore is noted, but overall the show is recommended for fans digging into the 1985 East Coast run.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review gives a solid 4‑star rating, highlighting strong musical performance and good soundboard quality with minor omission.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice sounding source with added clarity, separation and high‑end detail; no major dropouts noted but the US Blues encore is missing from this file.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy first set with fast‑tempo numbers, followed by a second set that really lifts off – strong jams, inspired transitions and a celebratory finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: In good voice; locks into groove on Fadeaway and adds interesting riffs on Minglewood.
band_member_comments.Bob: Generally in good voice throughout the run.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent delivers a hot solo on Minglewood and contributes to the overall energy.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums/Space described as weird and interesting, leading into The Wheel.
